# Competency Questions

## Which projects do lanes belong to, and which repository? #cq #projects

The ontology should answer, from `projects.md`, which of the storefront, billing,
or data-platform projects lanes touch and which repository each uses.

## What is the current cross-project direction? #cq #direction

The ontology should state, from `direction.md`, the current priorities (unified
checkout, hardened data platform) so a lane moves them forward.

## Which agent role owns this lane? #cq #agent-roles

The ontology should answer, from `agent-roles.md`, whether a frontend worker,
backend worker, or the team controller is responsible for the lane.
